name: bawbel-scanner — AVE per-artifact findings import
description: Imports the output of the bawbel-scanner (the reference scanner for AVE — Agentic Vulnerability Enumeration, github.com/bawbel/ave, Apache-2.0). `pip install bawbel-scanner` scans agentic-AI components — skill files, MCP server manifests, system prompts, agent components — for behavioral vulnerability classes (external-fetch / metamorphic payloads, confused-deputy tool-allowlist breaches, indirect prompt injection, hardcoded credentials, unsafe delegation, context leaks, …) and emits AVE-in-SARIF 2.1.0 (each result references an AVE-2026-##### rule with an AIVSS score + OWASP MCP / MITRE ATLAS mappings, a file:line location, a confidence float and the detection engine). This connector parses the scanner's SARIF (or a flat {findings:[]} / array JSON) and maps each per-artifact detection into XORCISM.AVESCANFINDING — real, located findings (file:line, AIVSS, confidence) cross-linked to the AVE catalogue (/ave) and surfaced in its Scan-findings view, complementing the inferred agent-exposure assessment. Worker-safe & read-only: parses an exported scan report only (no scanning, no code execution).

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: A bawbel-scanner report: AVE-in-SARIF 2.1.0 (gs/bawbel-scanner --sarif out.sarif), or a flat {findings:[]} / array JSON. Defaults to the bundled sample SARIF.

parameters.name: source
parameters.help: Source label stamped on imported findings. Re-importing the same source replaces its previous scan snapshot.

parameters.name: scan_ref
parameters.help: Optional scan reference (repo, branch, commit, run id) recorded with the findings.
